name: Pardoprunox
description: Pardoprunox has been used in trials studying the treatment of Early Stage Parkinson's Disease and Advanced Stage Parkinson's Disease. Pardoprunox is a partial dopamine D2 agonist and noradrenergic agonist with serotonin 5-HT1A agonist properties.
mechanismOfAction: Pardoprunox binds to dopamine D(2), D(3), and D(4) receptors and 5-HT(1) (A) receptors and is a partial agonist at dopamine D(2) and D(3) receptors and a full agonist at serotonin 5-HT(1) (A) receptors. Pardoprunox combines high potency partial agonism at dopamine D(2) and D(3) receptors with full efficacy low potency serotonin 5-HT(1) (A) receptor agonism and is worthy of profiling in in vivo models of Parkinson's disease.
